name: threejs-orb
description: 3D rendering benchmark: each model builds a full-screen three.js scene of a glowing, rotating orb. Loaded from CDN, captured after the animation settles.
systemPrompt: You are a creative WebGL/three.js developer. Output a SINGLE self-contained HTML document. three.js r160 is available as an ES module — import it with `import * as THREE from 'three'`, and add-ons from `three/addons/...` (e.g. `import { EffectComposer } from 'three/addons/postprocessing/EffectComposer.js'`); you may also use `gsap`. (A bundler/importmap resolves these for you, so just use bare imports inside a <script type="module">.) The scene must fill the entire viewport (100vw x 100vh), start animating automatically on load with no user interaction, and look striking within 2 seconds. Dark, cinematic background. Return ONLY the HTML document.
prompt: Create a mesmerizing full-screen three.js scene: a glowing, slowly rotating crystalline orb or icosahedron floating in space, with emissive material, colored point lights, subtle bloom-like glow, and a field of small drifting particles or stars around it. Cinematic, premium, dark and atmospheric. It must look beautiful immediately on load.
